content.text: I'll complete this task step by step. Let me start by going to the home screen.
请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

I can see a note already contains "Transaction ID: def456". I need to select this text and copy it. Let me tap on the text to enter edit mode, then select all and copy.

First, let me tap on the text to place the cursor there.
